mechanism_narrative: A persistent upward trajectory in the federal funds rate increases the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, mechanically compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market exceeding a 0.4 percentage point increase in the unemployment rate over a rolling three-month window signals an impending economic contraction, triggering a sell-off in cyclical equities and yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 55% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: The joint persistence of rising housing starts and stable nonfarm payrolls confirms robust consumer demand and construction sector momentum, which drives positive earnings revisions and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark by at least 1.5% over a 3-year rolling window, or the cross-sectional correlation between the proxy composite and forward returns falls below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Within a high-inflation regime, a sustained CPI reading above 3.5% forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, which elevates the equity risk premium and depresses forward valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns in high-CPI periods are statistically indistinguishable from baseline returns (p > 0.10), or the signal produces positive returns in more than 40% of high-inflation observations.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing throughput and healthy supply-side capacity utilization, which directly supports near-term corporate revenue growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal's information coefficient drops below 0.02 over any 12-month rolling window, or industrial production increases consistently coincide with negative or flat 5-day equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in retail sales exceeding a 2.0% month-over-month decline indicates a sharp pullback in consumer spending, which rapidly deteriorates near-term earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward directional accuracy remains below 50% over a 3-year test period, or the median 20-day forward return following a sales contraction is non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous occurrence of rising unemployment and declining nonfarm payrolls over a two-month window confirms a structural labor market cooling, which accelerates recessionary equity repricing and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to generate a statistically significant negative alpha (t-stat < -1.5) over a 5-year out-of-sample period, or forward returns in confirmed cooling periods are not lower than periods of stable labor data.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery regime, positive quarterly GDP growth combined with a month-over-month CPI decline establishes a soft-landing environment that reduces discount rate uncertainty and lifts equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative forward returns in more than 55% of qualifying soft-landing observations, or the forward return spread between recovery and non-recovery regimes falls below 0.5% over a 3-year rolling window.
